expect: cell_blueprint.py built with save/load subcommands. Blueprint captures >=6 state dimensions. First save produces valid JSON. Load takes <5s vs orient 14-60s. Predict: blueprint-loaded sessions reach first productive action >=20% faster.
actual: cell_blueprint.py built with save/load. 8 state dimensions: session, metrics, active_lanes, recent_commits, uncommitted, next_actions, periodics_due, dispatch_top3. Save produces valid JSON. Load completes in <2s. Dispatch collision detection included.
diff: Expected >=6 dimensions: CONFIRMED (8). Expected <5s: CONFIRMED (<2s). Tool is complementary to orient.py not replacement. 20% boot time reduction requires 10-session measurement window (S480-S490).
effect_size: orient.py 14-60s vs blueprint <2s (7-30x faster for state restoration). True test: does combined blueprint+orient time decrease vs orient-only?
falsification_criteria: FALSIFIED if: (1) no >=20% reduction in time-to-first-action across 10 sessions, (2) blueprint always used WITH full orient (redundant), (3) stale >50% of time
self_apply: This session IS a cell. Blueprint saved at handoff tests whether next session boots faster.
